text:
First, note that Australia/Sydney is UTC+10 during standard time, but in July (winter in the Southern Hemisphere), Sydney is on standard time (UTC+10).  

2 PM UTC = 14:00 UTC.  
Add 10 hours: 14:00 + 10:00 = 24:00 → which is 00:00 next day.  

July 24, 1053 at 14:00 UTC + 10 hours = July 25, 1053 at 00:00 in Sydney.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1053-07-25 00:00
